ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: Clear, text-based certificate with all fields legible. Original certificate issued by West Sweden Chamber of Commerce.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_notes: Clear, text-based invoice. However, this is Invoice 780687 issued to Volvo Group Korea Ltd, NOT Invoice 779910 referenced in the certificate. The certificate file (Document A) pages 2-3 contain Invoice 779910, but Document B (the separate invoice file) contains Invoice 780687 — a completely different invoice.

lc_check.motivation: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The certificate number SEG-25D-402798 does not constitute an LC reference.

locations_found: Document B (Invoice 780687), page 1, footer: 'Visiting address: Volvo Merchandise AB, Bror Nilssons gata 5, 40508 GÖTEBORG, Sweden'
consignor_search.notes: Volvo Merchandise AB is found in the visiting address footer of Invoice 780687 (Document B). However, Invoice 780687 is a different invoice (invoiced to Volvo Group Korea Ltd, order W264079) than the one referenced in the certificate (Invoice 779910, order W263979). The certificate's referenced invoice 779910 is embedded within the certificate file (Document A, pages 2-3) but is NOT present in the separate invoice file (Document B).

document_pairing.method: Certificate references Invoice 779910; Document B contains Invoice 780687
document_pairing.pairing_notes: CRITICAL PAIRING FAILURE per rule 8.5.2: The certificate explicitly references Invoice 779910 (dated 2025-11-06, order W263979). The separate invoice file (Document B) contains Invoice 780687 (dated 2025-Nov-19, order W264079, invoiced to Volvo Group Korea Ltd). These are two completely different invoices with different invoice numbers, dates, order numbers, invoicing addresses, and goods. Invoice 779910 exists only embedded within the certificate file (Document A, pages 2-3) but per rule 8.5.0, embedded invoices in the certificate file are NOT the invoice for verification. The invoice file (Document B) does not contain the referenced invoice.

sanity_check_8_6.notes: Criterion 1: Certificate references Invoice 779910, but Document B contains Invoice 780687 — NO MATCH. Criterion 2: Volvo Merchandise AB appears in Document B footer — met. Criterion 3: Certificate consignee is EURL Renault Trucks Algeria in Alger, Algeria. Document B is invoiced to Volvo Group Korea Ltd in Seoul, Korea — NO MATCH. Only 1 of 3 criteria met (consignor in footer). However, the invoice number mismatch is critical: per rule 8.5.2, when the certificate references a specific invoice number that cannot be found in the invoice file, the result must be MANUAL_REVIEW. Furthermore, the consignee and all goods are completely different, confirming this is NOT a valid document pair.

consignor.certificate_value: Volvo Merchandise AB, Bror Nilssons gata 5, SE-40508, GÖTEBORG, Sweden
consignor.invoice_value: Invoicing address: Volvo Group Korea Ltd, Seoul, Korea. Visiting address footer: Volvo Merchandise AB, Bror Nilssons gata 5, 40508 GÖTEBORG, Sweden

comparison_steps.description: Certificate references Invoice 779910 but Document B contains Invoice 780687. Per rule 8.5.2, the referenced invoice cannot be found in the invoice file.

rules_applied.description: Certificate references specific invoice number not found in invoice file

consignor.debug_explanation: The certificate references Invoice 779910 but the invoice file (Document B) contains Invoice 780687. These are entirely different invoices for different customers (Renault Trucks Algeria vs Volvo Group Korea Ltd). While 'Volvo Merchandise AB' appears in the footer of Invoice 780687 as the visiting/issuing address, the fundamental problem is that this is the wrong invoice entirely. Per rule 8.5.2, the verification cannot proceed with a different invoice than the one referenced.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Accept match because Volvo Merchandise AB appears in the footer of Invoice 780687
rejected_hypotheses.reason: While the consignor name does appear in the invoice footer, this is an entirely different invoice (780687 vs 779910) with different customers, goods, and order numbers. The document pairing is invalid per rule 8.5.2.

consignee.certificate_value: EURL Renault Trucks Algeria, Propriété Zaoui Mohamed, les Grands Vents, Section 01, ilot 779, Dely Ibrahim, NIF: 000216001879706, Alger, Algeria
consignee.invoice_value: Invoicing address: Volvo Group Korea Ltd, Seoul, Korea. Delivery address: Volvo Group Korea, Seoul, Korea

comparison_steps.step: Search for EURL Renault Trucks Algeria in Invoice 780687
comparison_steps.description: Searched all text in Document B for 'EURL Renault Trucks Algeria' or 'Renault Trucks'. Not found anywhere in Invoice 780687.

rules_applied.description: MISMATCH: consignee not identifiable in invoice

consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee is EURL Renault Trucks Algeria in Alger, Algeria. Invoice 780687 is invoiced to Volvo Group Korea Ltd in Seoul, Korea with delivery to Volvo Group Korea in Seoul, Korea. The consignee name 'EURL Renault Trucks Algeria' does not appear anywhere in Invoice 780687. These are entirely different customers in different countries (Algeria vs Korea).

goods_description.certificate_value: 32 PACKAGES: Jackets, Polo, Shirt, Cable, Bag, Mug, Phone holder, Umbrella, Pin, Table Pylon, Keyring, Towel, Beanie, Flag, Cap, Back pack, Card protector. According to attached invoice 779910 dated 2025-11-06.
goods_description.invoice_value: Invoice 780687: Belt, Fleece Jacket EN ISO 20471, Long Sleeve EN ISO 20471, Softshell Jacket, Functional Jacket, Waistpants Stretch, Base Water Bottle

comparison_steps.description: Certificate references invoice 779910. Document B contains invoice 780687. Invoice numbers do not match.

Certificate goods (Jackets, Polo, Shirt, Cable, Bag, Mug, etc.) are entirely different from Invoice 780687 goods (Belt, Fleece Jacket EN ISO 20471, Long Sleeve, Softshell Jacket, Functional Jacket, Waistpants Stretch, Base Water Bottle).

rules_applied.description: Invoice reference in certificate does not match invoice file
MISMATCH: goods description cannot be verified

goods_description.debug_explanation: The certificate references invoice 779910 dated 2025-11-06 but Document B contains invoice 780687 dated 2025-11-19. The goods are entirely different: certificate lists promotional merchandise items (Jackets, Polo, Shirt, Cable, Bag, Mug, Phone holder, etc.) while invoice 780687 lists safety/workwear items (Belt, Fleece Jacket EN ISO 20471, Long Sleeve EN ISO 20471, Softshell Jacket, Functional Jacket, Waistpants Stretch, Base Water Bottle). This is a clear mismatch on both invoice reference and goods content.

quantity.invoice_value: No corresponding total weight in Invoice 780687. Invoice 780687 total amount: 543.00 EUR.

comparison_steps.description: Searched all numerical values in Document B for 312.44. Not found. Invoice 780687 has no total weight field.
Invoice 780687 has per-row Kg values. Sum of all Kg: 0.50+0.60+0.60+0.30+0.30+0.67+0.67+1.02+1.02+0.64+0.64+0.40 = 7.36 kg. This does not match 312.44 KG.

rules_applied.description: Numeric value 312.44 not found in invoice

quantity.debug_explanation: Certificate states 312.44 KG NET. Invoice 780687 does not contain this value anywhere. The per-row Kg values in Invoice 780687 sum to approximately 7.36 kg, which is vastly different from 312.44 KG. This is a completely different shipment.

country_of_origin.invoice_value: CHN, MMR, SWE (per CoO column in Invoice 780687)

comparison_steps.description: CN (China) corresponds to CHN in Invoice 780687. CHN is found for multiple items.
TR (Turkey) — searched for TUR or Turkey in Invoice 780687. Not found. Invoice 780687 has CHN, MMR, and SWE as origin codes.
IN (India) — searched for IND or India in Invoice 780687. Not found. Invoice 780687 has CHN, MMR, and SWE as origin codes.

comparison_steps.step: Check for non-matching origins in invoice
comparison_steps.description: Invoice 780687 contains origins MMR (Myanmar) and SWE (Sweden) which are not listed in the certificate.

rules_applied.description: MISMATCH: TR and IN not found in invoice; invoice contains MMR and SWE not in certificate

country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate lists origins CN, TR, IN. Invoice 780687 lists CHN, MMR, SWE. While CN≈CHN, Turkey (TR/TUR) and India (IN/IND) are not present in Invoice 780687. Additionally, Invoice 780687 contains Myanmar (MMR) and Sweden (SWE) which are not in the certificate. This confirms these are completely different shipments.

rule_evaluation_log.outcome: No LC reference found in certificate

Certificate file (Document A) contains certificate on page 1 and Invoice 779910 on pages 2-3. Invoice file (Document B) contains Invoice 780687. Per rule 8.5.0, verification must use Invoice from Document B (Invoice 780687), not the embedded invoice from Document A.

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: Certificate references specific invoice number not found in invoice file
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: Certificate references Invoice 779910 but Document B contains Invoice 780687. Per rule 8.5.2, this should normally result in MANUAL_REVIEW. However, the complete mismatch across ALL checkpoints (consignee, goods, quantity, origin) confirms this is genuinely the wrong invoice — not merely a numbering discrepancy. The verification result is NOT_IDENTICAL.

FAILED: Invoice number does not match (779910 vs 780687). Consignor found in footer only. Consignee completely different (EURL Renault Trucks Algeria vs Volvo Group Korea Ltd). Only 1 of 3 criteria met. Combined with complete mismatch on all substantive checkpoints, this confirms an invalid document pair.
Volvo Merchandise AB found in visiting address footer of Invoice 780687. However, the invoice is the wrong document entirely.
EURL Renault Trucks Algeria not found anywhere in Invoice 780687. Invoice is addressed to Volvo Group Korea Ltd.

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: Generic goods description with invoice reference
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: Certificate references invoice 779910; Document B contains invoice 780687. Reference mismatch.
312.44 KG NET not found in Invoice 780687.
TR and IN not found in Invoice 780687. Invoice contains MMR and SWE not in certificate.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Fel faktura har bifogats. Certifikatet hänvisar till faktura 779910 (ställd till EURL Renault Trucks Algeria i Algeriet) men den bifogade fakturafilen innehåller faktura 780687 (ställd till Volvo Group Korea Ltd i Sydkorea). Varorna, mottagaren, kvantiteterna och ursprungsländerna skiljer sig helt mellan certifikatet och den bifogade fakturan.
blocking_issues: Wrong invoice file attached: Certificate references Invoice 779910 but invoice file contains Invoice 780687
Consignee mismatch: EURL Renault Trucks Algeria (certificate) vs Volvo Group Korea Ltd (invoice)
Goods completely different: promotional merchandise vs safety/workwear items
Quantity not verifiable: 312.44 KG NET not found in invoice
overall_assessment.notes: The certificate file (Document A) contains both the certificate (page 1) and Invoice 779910 (pages 2-3). However, per rule 8.5.0, the embedded invoice in the certificate file cannot be used for verification — verification must use the separate invoice file (Document B), which contains Invoice 780687. This is a completely different invoice for a different customer, different goods, and different destination. The correct Invoice 779910 should be submitted as the separate invoice file.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot faktura

sections.motivation: Certifikatet hänvisar uttryckligen till faktura 779910 men den bifogade fakturafilen innehåller faktura 780687. Faktura 779910 finns enbart inbäddad i certifikatfilen (sida 2-3) och kan enligt regel 8.5.0 inte användas för verifiering.

sections.certificate_value: Volvo Merchandise AB, Bror Nilssons gata 5, SE-40508, GÖTEBORG, Sweden
sections.invoice_value: Fakturautställare: Volvo Group Korea Ltd, Seoul, Korea. Footer: Volvo Merchandise AB, Bror Nilssons gata 5, 40508 GÖTEBORG, Sweden
sections.motivation: Volvo Merchandise AB återfinns i fakturans sidfot (visiting address), men fakturan är en helt annan faktura (780687) än den certifikatet avser (779910). Verifieringen kan inte genomföras mot fel faktura.

sections.motivation: Certifikatets mottagare är EURL Renault Trucks Algeria i Algeriet. Faktura 780687 är ställd till Volvo Group Korea Ltd i Seoul, Sydkorea. Mottagarnamnet 'EURL Renault Trucks Algeria' förekommer inte någonstans i faktura 780687. Helt olika mottagare i helt olika länder.

sections.certificate_value: 32 PACKAGES: Jackets, Polo, Shirt, Cable, Bag, Mug, Phone holder, Umbrella, Pin, Table Pylon, Keyring, Towel, Beanie, Flag, Cap, Back pack, Card protector. Ref: Invoice 779910 dated 2025-11-06.

sections.motivation: Certifikatet refererar till faktura 779910 med reklamartiklar (jackor, pikéer, skjortor, kablar, väskor, muggar etc.). Faktura 780687 innehåller helt andra varor (säkerhetskläder, bälte, vattenflaska). Varken fakturanummer eller varuinnehåll överensstämmer.

sections.invoice_value: Ingen motsvarande totalvikt i faktura 780687. Radvikter summerar till ca 7,36 kg.
sections.rule_applied: Kvantiteten kan inte identifieras i fakturan
sections.motivation: Certifikatet anger 312,44 KG NET. Faktura 780687 saknar totalvikt och radernas kg-summering (ca 7,36 kg) avviker helt från certifikatets värde. Kvantiteten kan inte verifieras.

sections.invoice_value: CHN, MMR, SWE (per CoO-kolumn i faktura 780687)
sections.motivation: Certifikatet anger CN, TR, IN. Faktura 780687 anger CHN, MMR, SWE. TR (Turkiet) och IN (Indien) saknas helt i fakturan. Fakturan innehåller MMR (Myanmar) och SWE (Sverige) som inte anges i certifikatet.

output_quality_checks.consistency_notes: All 5 checkpoints are MISMATCH. comparison_result = NOT_IDENTICAL. workflow_recommendation = MANUAL_HANDLING_REQUIRED. All consistent.
